subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who is the author of 'The Court of the Maharaja'?
question_hi: ‘महाराजा के कार्यालय' के लेखक कौन हैं।
explanation_en: Arthur L. Bloomfield is the author of 'The Court of the Maharaja'.

explanation_en: Arthur Zermani, also known as the Court Historian of Maharaja Kalyan Singh, is the author of 'The Court Historian of Maharaja Kalyan Singh',
